author: smuzaffar
body: This PR proposes to remove the L1Trigger/Phase2L1GMT/data/packedGainLUTs.root  root file from cmssw. This file is now available via https://github.com/cms-data/L1Trigger-Phase2L1GMT/pull/1 (already merged for CMSSW_17_0_X)  IBs. Both of these root files ( one in `cms-sw/cmssw` and the one in `cms-data/L1Trigger-Phase2L1GMT`) are identical (md5sum matches)
title: Remove L1Trigger/Phase2L1GMT/data/packedGainLUTs.root which is available via cms-data
